name: Mary Reese — siblings
researcher_question: Who were the siblings of Mary Reese, born 1880 in New York and died 22 June 1933?
notes: Mary Reese (b. 1880 NY, d. 22 Jun 1933 Queens NY) was a daughter of Lewis Joseph Reese and Laura Amelia Scott. Her nine siblings: Clarence (1869), Elizabeth Jane (1875), Lewis (1878), Lora A (1883), Martin Joseph (1885), Jenny (1887), Fanny (1888), Richard (1890), Emily Florence (1892) Reese. Stripped all nine sibling persons + their parent links. Anchors kept: Mary and her parents. Reachability confirmed: the 1880 census 'Household of Louis Reese' lists the early siblings (Clarence, Elizabeth/Lizzie, Lewis); the 1892 NY state and 1900 censuses cover the later ones. Required = the 3 in the 1880 census; bonus = the 6 born after 1880.
